arts.ttl: Aston Villa interested in signing Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: The 27-year-old has fallen out of favour at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa make loan enquiry for Man Utd's Rashford
arts.sum: Aston Villa have made an enquiry over the loan signing of Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery says Ollie Watkins ‘happy to stay’ at Aston Villa
arts.sum: The club are reportedly interested in signing Marcus Rashford on loan.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa enter race to sign Marcus Rashford from Manchester United
arts.sum: Rashford has been frozen out at Old Trafford and is looking for a move this window

arts.ttl: Al-Nassr secure Villa’s Durán but have second Mitoma bid rejected by Brighton
arts.sum: Colombian links up with Cristiano Ronaldo in £71m deal Neymar rejoins Santos from Saudi Arabian club Al-Hilal Jhon Durán has completed his move from Aston Villa to Al-Nassr for a fee of up to £71m, becoming the latest player from one of Europe’s top leagues to move to Saudi Arabia. The 21-year-old Colombia international will team up with Cristiano Ronaldo and wear the No 9 shirt. The initial fee is about £65m and represents a significant profit for Villa, who signed him from Chicago Fire for £18m. Durán has scored 12 goals in 29 games for Villa this season, including a memorable winner against Bayern Munich in the Champions League. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa Transfer News: Al-Nassr officially complete €77m Jhon Duran signing
arts.sum: Al-Nassr have officially completed the signing of Aston Villa striker Jhon Duran . The official confirmation of Duran's transfer comes shortly after news broke that Aston Villa had opened talks with Man Utd outcast Marcus Rashford as one of their potential replacements for the 20-year-old.

arts.ttl: Villa interested in loan deal for Rashford
arts.sum: Aston Villa are one of a number of clubs interested in Manchester United's out-of-favour striker Marcus Rashford.

arts.ttl: Duran completes move from Villa to Saudi
arts.sum: Aston Villa forward Jhon Duran has completed a £64m move to Saudi Pro League club Al Nassr.

arts.ttl: Jhon Durán joins Ronaldo at Al Nassr from Villa
arts.sum: Jhon Durán has completed his transfer from Aston Villa to Al Nassr as the Saudi Pro League side look to bolster their forward line for the second half of the season.

arts.ttl: Team News: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs. Aston Villa injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Wolverhampton Wanderers and Aston Villa.
